inputs.label: Real part (cx)
inputs.businessContext: The real component of the complex parameter c.

inputs.label: Imaginary part (cy)
inputs.businessContext: The imaginary component of the complex parameter c.

inputs.label: Maximum Iterations
inputs.businessContext: Maximum number of iterations before considering the point as part of the Mandelbrot set.

inputs.label: Escape Radius
inputs.businessContext: Radius threshold for escape condition; typically 2.

formulas.result: (function(cx,cy,maxIter,escapeRadius){ let real=0,imag=0; for(let i=0;i<maxIter;i++){ let r2=real*real,i2=imag*imag; if(r2+i2>escapeRadius*escapeRadius) return {iterations:i,escaped:true,magnitude:Math.sqrt(r2+i2)}; let newReal=r2-i2+cx,newImag=2*real*imag+cy; real=newReal;imag=newImag; } return {iterations:maxIter,escaped:false,magnitude:Math.sqrt(real*real+imag*imag)}; })(inputs.real,inputs.imag,inputs.maxIter,inputs.escapeRadius)
